## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Holly Simmons (Outreach CMO) and Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) to explore potential content marketing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Outreach aims to shift focus from SMB/mid-market to enterprise customers, requiring more sophisticated marketing approaches](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content production at scale, positioning as a potential solution for Outreach's organic growth challenges](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Holly expressed interest in a trial project to evaluate GrowthX's capabilities and impact](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)

## Topics

### Outreach's Current Challenges and Goals

  - [Transitioning focus from SMB/mid-market to enterprise customers](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Evolving product narrative from XDR-centric to full revenue platform for CROs, RevOps, CMOs, CIOs](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Expanding presence in EMEA market](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Increasing brand awareness while balancing pipe generation](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Competing with high-spending competitors like Gong in the awareness game](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [AI-powered content production system with expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Capability to produce high-quality content at scale (100k words at $0.10-0.20/word)](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
  - [12-week initial engagement to craft strategy, calibrate style, and iterate based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Focus on building topical authority across various relevant subjects](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [Track record of significant traffic increases (e.g., 24x for DeepRam) leading to brand search and user growth](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)

### Outreach's Content Marketing Status

  - [\~400 blog posts with 10 driving most traffic](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Internal research and data available but potentially not optimized for target audience](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Flat or declining organic traffic over past 3 years despite established domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)

### Potential Collaboration Next Steps

  - [Marcel to prepare a detailed proposal for a trial project](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [Holly to involve Deanna Morris (Growth Marketing), Hadassah (SEO), and Lex (Hadassah's manager) in follow-up discussions](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send a detailed proposal for a trial project by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)
  - [Holly to review proposal and coordinate internal team (Deanna, Hadassah, Lex) for follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Explore specific engagement details and potential impact in next discussion](https://fathom.video/share/6J9dodMFuNYcrYc612FkygUfF8tBb8fR?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
